posts.author: Jason (Jason Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like to see the ability to change a status to the default blank option in automations. In our work flow it’s sometimes necessary to essentially void out a previous status, to show that some rework is needed.

The automation is "When a STATUS changes to SOMETHING, change ANOTHER STATUS to SOMETHING…but I’m not able to assign a blank status to that second “something”

I’ve created a workaround by creating a status called “-” but it seems unnecessary. The ability to map that to “blank” would be helpful.

Thanks,
Jason
